404.title: Page not found
404.heading: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.
404.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.
404.message: The page you're looking for doesn't exist.

form.validation-failed: Form validation failed. Please fix the errors and try again.
form.validation-failed-fields: Validation failed for {{count}} field{{plural}}. Please check the highlighted fields.
form.validation-failed-field: Validation failed for 1 field. Please check the highlighted field.
form.validation-failed-fields-plural: Validation failed for {{count}} fields. Please check the highlighted fields.

global.title: Oops! Something went wrong
global.message: Sorry, something unexpected happened. Our team has been notified and is working to fix the issue.

entity.notFoundMessage: The {{entity}} you're looking for doesn't exist or has been deleted.
entity.accessDeniedMessage: You don't have permission to {{operation}} this {{entity}}.
entity.connectionErrorMessage: Unable to connect to the server. Please check your internet connection and try again.
entity.validationErrorMessage: The data provided is not valid. Please check your inputs and try again.
entity.genericErrorMessage: An error occurred while trying to {{operation}} {{entity}}. Please try again.

toast.errorCopiedMessage: Error details copied to clipboard. Please share it with support.
toast.copyFailedMessage: Could not copy error details. Please take a screenshot instead.

route.updateRequiredMessage: The application has been updated. Please reload the page to continue.
route.connectionProblemMessage: Could not load the page. Please check your internet connection and try again.
route.accessDeniedMessage: You don't have permission to access {{route}}.
route.accessDeniedMessageGeneric: You don't have permission to access this page.
route.genericErrorMessage: An unexpected error occurred while loading {{route}}. Our team has been notified.
route.genericErrorMessageGeneric: An unexpected error occurred. Our team has been notified.
